title: Avoid using @SpringBootApplication and @ComponentScan in the default package
description: Using @ComponentScan in the default package will cause the entire classpath to be scanned, slowing down the application start-up and potentially causing a BeanDefinitionStoreException.
recommendation: Configure the basePackageClasses or basePackages parameter in @ComponentScan to limit the packages being scanned.
impact: Slows down application start-up and increases the risk of a BeanDefinitionStoreException.

checks.message: Configure the basePackageClasses or basePackages parameter in @ComponentScan to limit the packages being scanned.
